title: What are gold-backed stablecoins and can they become the future of digital gold investing?
summary: As gold prices rise amid West Asia tensions, India increases customs duty on gold to 15% to conserve foreign exchange. title: NSE's Electronic Gold Receipts: What are EGRs and what is in them for gold buyers?
summary: EGRs give people the option to convert their physical gold into electronic format, hold it and enjoy the upside in gold prices, and later sell it or convert back to physical gold. The gold’s purity is assured and can be bought in small quantities of 100 milligrams.
